rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in component type scopes when referring to component ports.
Use annex agree {** ... **}; blocks for AGREE contract syntax.
generic_rules: Align helper declaration types with actual expression types in AGREE.
Omit unsafe Boolean comparisons unless the port is explicitly AGREE bool.
Do not invent numeric bounds unless explicitly stated in the requirement.
Avoid encoding AADL properties as AGREE variables without explicit typed ports.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks.
Component type scopes are preferred for port-based assumptions and guarantees.
anti_patterns: Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts without valid variables.
Do not assume numeric bounds for ports without explicit requirement support.
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations as AGREE variables
